channel.title: Home on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: How Deep Is the Moat? Reading TSMC, SK Hynix, and Micron Through Their SEC Filings
item.description: Customer prepayments, HBM margin structure, capital expenditure intensity — the numbers say more than the narratives do.

item.title: The Real AI Supply Chain: A Power Map Beyond the GPU
item.description: From TSMC to SK Hynix to Ajinomoto — who holds pricing power, and who is just riding the narrative?

item.title: What Are CoWoS, HBM, and ABF - And Why Do They Matter So Much in the AI Era?
item.description: A plain-language walkthrough of CoWoS, HBM, and ABF — what they actually are, why they are always mentioned together, and how they map onto Taiwan's role in the global AI supply chain.

item.title: The Bottleneck Nobody Is Pricing In: Where AI Compute Really Breaks
item.description: Every layer that looks solved hides another constraint beneath it. A deep look at CoWoS, HBM, and ABF substrate — the three physical bottlenecks shaping AI infrastructure.

item.title: AI Drug Discovery Is Not Just About Speed
item.description: What AI really changes in drug discovery is the way search space is organized — not just speed.

item.title: Interface Control May Matter More Than Website Ownership
item.description: The next battle for brand power will be fought through control over the layer where demand is matched to supply.

item.title: Trust Still Comes Before Efficiency
item.description: AI does not replace trust. It amplifies the value of trust by making it more scalable.

item.title: Infrastructure-Led Leading Indicators in Technology Investment Cycles: Evidence from the Semiconductor Industry
item.description: SSRN Working Paper - Infrastructure constraints as predictive signals for technology investment cycles

item.title: 2025 AI晶片產業趨勢
item.description: 產業概況 隨著生成式 AI、大型語言模型（LLM）與資料中心算力需求持續成長，AI 晶片已成為半導體產業中最具戰略價值的細分市場之一。 2025 年，全球 AI 晶片市場規模預期將持續擴張，主要...

item.title: Welcome to My Research Portfolio
item.description: Welcome to my professional research website. This platform showcases my academic work, publications,...

item.title: AlphaFold 3 and the Future of Drug Discovery
item.description: A brief observation from my research: AlphaFold 3's ability to predict protein-ligand interactions i...

Article 4 | Stress-Testing the Moat: Four Threats That Could Rewrite the AI Supply Chain

Subtitle: TurboQuant, HBM demand reversal, geopolitics, and glass substrates — not a doomsday scenario, but a disciplined analysis.

Series: AI Compute Supply Chain | Part 4 of 5 Author: Sinclair Huang | sinclairhuang.org

Four pressure vectors. Four clocks already ticking. The question is not whether these moats will last forever — it’s whether you know which one breaks first.

item.title: About
item.description: Po-Sung (Sinclair) Huang 黃柏松 — Independent Researcher in AI, Infrastructure, and Capital Markets. EDBA, HEC Liège. ORCID: 0009-0007-8173-5672

item.title: Consulting Services
item.description: Strategic advisory in AI, biotechnology, and competitive intelligence

item.title: Data & Resources
item.description:
📊 AI Semiconductor Valuation Dataset

Utilizing GEE regression and Random Forest models to analyze the impact of R&D intensity on firm valuation across 95 global semiconductor firms.
